name: codecut
description: Local video editing workspace for Codex-controlled media import, transcript-aware planning, verified timeline updates, preview, and export checks.

interface.shortDescription: Create, inspect, and verify local video edits with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codecut gives Codex a local video editing workspace for importing media, reading transcript and timeline state, applying validated EditPlans, previewing the visible editor state, and checking export readiness. Codex stays the planning layer; Codecut keeps timeline mutation, readback, and export local and verifiable.
defaultPrompt: Open Codecut and set up a local video editing workspace.
Import my local video into Codecut and prepare a short-form edit.
Turn this source clip into a 30-90 second vertical short with captions.
